description_long: This object is a rectangular, flat box with a teal-colored lid featuring a diagonal orange stripe and a central window displaying two circular items, possibly confections or decorative objects. The lid is partially open, revealing a black tray inside that is divided into a grid, each compartment holding a round item with a white and dark pattern. The box has branding and text on the lid, including the name 'LAUMIERE' and several green circular icons, suggesting it is a premium or specialty parcel, likely for gifting. The construction appears to be primarily cardboard or paperboard, with a glossy printed exterior and a plastic or coated paper tray insert. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on presentation and protection of the contents. The object is lightweight and portable, suitable for hand delivery or placement on a flat surface.
description: A teal rectangular gift box with a partially open lid, revealing a black tray of round items inside. The lid features branding, a window, and decorative stripes.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the teal lid with branding and a window, partially open to reveal the black tray and its grid of round items.
description_view_1: Front view of the closed box, highlighting the teal lid, orange stripe, window, and branding details.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view, again showing the open lid and the black tray with visible round items in compartments.
description_view_3: Direct view into the open box, focusing on the grid layout of the tray and the round items inside.
